def negative_debug_log_serializes_full_large_object_graph():
    rule_id = "debug_log_serializes_full_large_object_graph"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Flag debug logging that walks and serializes large object graphs."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
